pi_items.source: Task description strictly mandates saving the screenshot to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/srb2_config.png', matching this exact path.
Task description specifically states: 'disable (turn OFF) the toggle for all ODD channels (1, 3, 5, 7)' and 'remain enabled (ON) for all EVEN channels (2, 4, 6, 8)'.

OpenBCI GUI v5.2.2 source code (ADS1299SettingsController.pde lines 80-84) defines the actual column header labels as 'PGA Gain', 'Input Type', 'Bias Include', 'SRB2', and 'SRB1'. There is no 'POWER' column header.

privileged_info_summary: The task correctly mandates configuring SRB2 such that odd channels (1, 3, 5, 7) are OFF and even channels (2, 4, 6, 8) are ON. The required output screenshot path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/srb2_config.png'. However, the claimed column headers in the hardware settings UI ('POWER', 'GAIN', etc.) are incorrect; the actual labels in OpenBCI GUI v5.2.2 are 'PGA Gain', 'Input Type', 'Bias Include', 'SRB2', and 'SRB1', with no 'POWER' column header.
